commit.message:
fix: use PostgreSQL direct query for today/yesterday KPIs

The main dashboard KPI cards ("Questões Hoje" and "vs ontem") were using
daily_volume snapshot deltas which undercount because snapshots don't
align exactly to midnight boundaries. Now fetches realtime summary
(same PostgreSQL COUNT query the Real-Time page uses) for accurate
midnight-to-midnight counts. Falls back to snapshot deltas if realtime
endpoint is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-link cancel audit & renewal records to winback on termination upload

When a termination audit is uploaded, a new RPC cross-matches policy numbers
against cancel_audit_records and renewal_records. Matching records get their
contact_id linked to the winback household (so contacts page shows "winback"
stage) and active work items (new/in_progress) are demoted to "lost" with
activity logging. Non-fatal — upload succeeds even if cross-match fails.

Also adds winback_household_id + sent_to_winback_at columns to renewal_records,
find_or_create_contact for the staff upload path, and cache invalidation for
cancel-audit/renewal/contacts query keys.

commit.message:
Make compliance instructions mandatory in generation prompt

Instructions are now presented as "OBLIGATORISKA REGLER" (mandatory rules)
that Claude must never break, instead of soft guidelines. This ensures
generated posts are compliant from the start, eliminating the need for
post-generation validation and manual fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: skip trafilatura for GDELT, metadata-only approach

GDELT path no longer calls trafilatura per URL.
160 URLs × ~5s = 800s exceeded the 12-min CI timeout.
GDELT now saves metadata only (title, image_url, language, domain,
published_at) with full_content_status="pending".
fundus already provides full HTML content for 50 major publishers.

Also: workflow timeout-minutes 12 → 20 (safety margin for fundus crawl)

Fix Step 3: clarify caller public key verification

Replace 805-line monolith with componentized architecture:
- task_templates table (30 templates) replaces hardcoded PHARMACY_TASKS
- Role system (9 roles) replaces boolean isManager
- useTaskData hook + taskEngine.js for template generation & filtering
- 7 new components: TaskCard, TaskSection, TaskSidebar, AssignModal,
  CompletionFlow, TeamOverview, RoleSpecificPanel

- Sidebar: My Tasks badge with overdue/pending counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Pin devcontainer Python to 3.13 to match HA runtime

The Renovate bot bumped the devcontainer image to Python 3.14, but
Home Assistant and this integration target Python 3.13. Running a
mismatched version in the dev environment risks masking compatibility
issues that would surface in production.

Also constrain Renovate via allowedVersions so the bot cannot bump
the devcontainer Python image beyond 3.13 in the future.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: DIV Games Studio SDL2 port, building on Windows

DIV Games Studio (1997) — game development IDE, compiler, and runtime
originally written for MS-DOS. This is the SDL2 cross-platform port
based on Mike Green's GNU open-source continuation, with fixes to
build and run natively on Windows using MSYS2/mingw32.

Includes: complete IDE with code editor, sprite/font/palette editors,
DIV language compiler, bytecode VM runtime, MODE8 3D engine, and
OS-dependency abstraction layer for SDL2.

Key changes from the upstream DIVGAMES/DIV-Games-Studio repo:
- Added windows-native.cmake for native MSYS2/mingw32 + SDL2 builds
- Fixed SDL2 cmake detection (FIND_PACKAGE component, string STRIP)
- Fixed Windows path separator crash in div.c
- Fixed critical SDL2 event loop bug in divmouse.c (PrintEvent as loop body)
- Fixed post-build deploy commands for Windows .exe extension
- Reorganized runtime into div/ subdirectory
- Added README with build instructions and codebase overview
- Added ROADMAP for future modernization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: div-games-studio
repository.description: DIV Games Studio — game development IDE, compiler and runtime. Originally MS-DOS (1997), now cross-platform via SDL2.

commit.message:
Add DB constraints and FK relationships for eureka_sets (#11)

* Migrate domain types to use Supabase generated types

Replace hand-written EurekaSet, EurekaVariant, Obtained, and Category
interfaces with type aliases derived from Tables<> in supabase.ts.
Remove redundant EurekaSets type in favor of Omit<EurekaSet, ...>.
Update column references from name/quality/labels to title/rarity/label
to match the current DB schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace hand-written row types with Supabase-derived types

Remove custom EurekaSetRow, EurekaVariantRow, and TrialRow from
dashboard.ts in favour of Tables<'eureka_sets'>, Tables<'eureka_variants'>,
and a new Trial type added to eureka.ts. Update admin table components,
the edit eureka set form, and data queries to use current column names
(title/rarity/label instead of name/quality/labels). Add getStyles and
getLabels data helpers; wire style and label selects into the edit form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add DB constraints and FK relationships for eureka_sets

- Add FK eureka_sets.label → labels.title (with unique constraint on labels.title)
- Add FK eureka_sets.style → styles.title (with unique constraint on styles.title)
- Add CHECK constraint eureka_sets.rarity BETWEEN 2 AND 5
- Regenerate Supabase types to reflect new relationships
- Update rarity select in add/edit forms to show options 2–5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect schema changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix stale column names and add styles/labels selects to eureka set forms

- Fix getEurekaSet selecting labels → label and add missing created_at/updated_at fields
- Fix edit form submit handler using labels prop array instead of label state
- Fix add form: rename insert fields (name→title, quality→rarity, labels→label), convert style/label TextFields to Select dropdowns backed by styles/labels props, fix trials using t.name→t.title
- Pass styles and labels from page to AddEurekaSetForm via getStyles()/getLabels()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add updated_at to trial table and migrate data fetching to hooks/data.ts

- Add updated_at to Trial type and getTrialsAdmin query; display in TrialTable
- Move all data fetching functions from lib/data.ts to hooks/data.ts
- Update all imports across pages to use @/hooks/data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename quality-stars to rarity-stars, update column names, and fix data hooks

Renames quality → rarity and labels → label throughout UI components and forms
to match the updated DB schema. Replaces quality-stars component with rarity-stars,

  return guard before calling getObtained so unauthenticated users don't
  trigger a spurious DB query with null coerced to UUID

LINK OPCJONALNY:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(agora): use publicProvider for queryFilter to avoid Magic RPC 50K block limit

Embedded wallets (Magic/Reown) route eth_getLogs through their RPC
which has a 50,000 block range cap. Our EVENTS_LOOKBACK spans ~65K+
blocks. Fixed getContract() to prefer agoraContractPublic (public RPC)
over agoraContract (signer/Magic RPC) for read operations.

commit.message:
fix(g020): align 'commits blocked' indicators with actual pre-commit enforcement (#18)

G020 in pre-commit-review.js blocks commits to main when pending deputy-CTO
questions OR unread agent reports exist, but the CTO notification hook and
slash-command-prefetch were only flagging when rejections > 0 (a narrower
condition). This caused the notification to say "clear" while commits were
actually blocked.

Changes:
- pre-commit-review.js: add 'preview' to the warn-only branch path in G020
  check so it is consistent with develop/staging (was falling through to allow)
- cto-notification-hook.js: change isCritical to (pending > 0 || unreadReports > 0)
  matching actual G020 block condition; rename label from "COMMITS BLOCKED" to
  "MAIN BLOCKED" for clarity; show total pending item count instead of rejections
- slash-command-prefetch.js: change commitsBlocked from rejection-only count to
  questions.length > 0 so prefetch data matches the enforcement logic

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add SD + TriForce sparse KV cache experiment

Integrate TriForce's attention-based chunk selection into standard
Speculative Decoding. The drafter (llama-68m) KV cache is sparsified
after prefill using per-head top-k chunk scoring. Ablation across
budgets 256/512/1024/2048 on gs, longbench_packed_qmsum, lwm datasets.

New files:
- sd_code/hl/speculative/sparse_cache.py: TriForce sparse selection
- sd_code/hl/data_loader.py: dataset loader (PG-19, QMSum, NarrativeQA)
- run_sd_setup.sh / run_sd_sparse.sh: RunPod experiment scripts

Modified:
- sd_code/hl/SD.py: rewritten with CLI args, AR baseline, CSV output
- sd_code/hl/speculative/speculative_decoding.py: sparse_budget support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: consolidate workspace from 12 to 7 crates (5 published)

Absorb 6 crates into their natural parents:
- x402-wallet → x402 core (wallet module, WASM-safe)
- x402-client → x402 core (client module, feature-gated behind "full")
- x402-erc8004 → x402-identity (erc8004 feature flag)
- x402-facilitator + x402-server → x402-gateway (facilitator module)
- x402-agent → x402-node (clone.rs + railway.rs)

x402 core now has features: full (default), wasm, demo.
Heavy deps (tokio, rusqlite, reqwest, dashmap) are optional behind "full".

Add app delete and unpublish features

  app record (DynamoDB), and GitHub repo (best-effort)
- POST /api/v1/apps/{app_id}/unpublish: sets is_published=false
- Both endpoints require owner or admin auth

  user to type the full app_id before the button enables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix permissions, auto-close, Slack notifications, and cron schedule

Permissions (ticket-permissions.ts):
- Rewrote validateTicketUpdate to be clean and correct
- Any user who can VIEW a ticket can now do operational updates
  (status, assigneeId, tags, slaStatus) without errors
- CX subDepartment restriction now only blocks editing core fields,
  not status/assignee changes — fixes Sadia and all Associate/Agent roles
- Removed the "unknown fields" error that was blocking legitimate updates

Auto-close (storage.ts, routes.ts, ticket-detail.tsx):
- Added autoCloseResolvedTickets() — closes tickets 24h after Solved
- Runs fire-and-forget on every GET /api/tickets (real-time)
- Also runs in daily cron at 10:30 AM PKT
- Closed is terminal: PATCH blocked on Closed tickets
- "Closed" removed from manual status dropdown in UI
- Lock banner shown on Closed ticket detail page

Slack notifications (slack-web-api.ts):
- sendSlackTicketCreated now matches the new compact message format
- Added .trim() to all env var channel ID reads

Slack reporter (slack-reporter.ts):
- Removed sendDailyReport() from automated cron and button flows
- runFullDailyReports() now awaits before responding (prevents lambda kill)
- Cron updated to 10:30 AM PKT (30 5 * * *)

Status transitions (routes.ts):
- New → Solved now allowed (was previously blocked)
- resolvedAt auto-stamped on Solved, cleared on re-open

Cron (vercel.json):
- Schedule updated from 0 3 * * * to 30 5 * * * (10:30 AM PKT)

perf: cut URL extraction from 22s worst-case to ~3-5s

- Block images/stylesheets/fonts/media — page loads text-only (50-70% faster)
- PAUSE 380ms → 100ms, MAX_STEPS 60 → 10, exit after 2 stuck steps
- Rendering wait 600ms → 200ms
- Page load timeout 30s → 20s
- Faster Puppeteer launch flags (disable-gpu, disable-extensions, etc.)

Expected total extraction time: 3-6s for most restaurant sites
